content:
🌟 cc-switch | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a unified and user-friendly desktop interface for managing and interacting with multiple AI coding assistants, simplifying developer workflows.
✨ Key Features: • Cross-platform desktop application (Windows, macOS, Linux) • All-in-One manager for multiple AI coding assistants • Supports Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Hermes Agent
📖 Summary: CC Switch is a cross-platform desktop application designed to manage and integrate various AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, OpenClaw, and Hermes Agent. It serves as an all-in-one interface for interacting with these different AI models, simplifying provider management and offering WSL support.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
